phases.name: digi_baseline
phases.criteria: Waypoint Capture (Capture all 4 route waypoints); Flight Stability (No NaNs or state divergence occurred during flight); Altitude Hold (Altitude remains within ±500 ft of target); Speed Hold (Airspeed remains within ±100 kts of target)

conditions.name: Flight Stability
conditions.description: No NaNs or state divergence occurred during flight: Passed

conditions.name: Altitude Hold
conditions.description: Altitude remains within ±500 ft of target: Passed

conditions.name: Speed Hold
conditions.description: Airspeed remains within ±100 kts of target: Passed
